default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboarding and orientation for Pedro Steimbruch, new engineer joining GrowthX.ai's client ops engineering team.](https://fathom.video/share/S8zKX5FzHtXziLEekZ6ziqx-iaF-S3N_?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is evolving from a growth agency to a multi-faceted AI/automation company, with 3 key areas: agency services, tooling (Atlas), and AI infrastructure](https://fathom.video/share/S8zKX5FzHtXziLEekZ6ziqx-iaF-S3N_?tab=summary&timestamp=31.0)
  - [Current focus is on migrating from AirOps to Atlas, stabilizing client ops engineering, and improving workflow creation/management](https://fathom.video/share/S8zKX5FzHtXziLEekZ6ziqx-iaF-S3N_?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
  - [Pedro will primarily support client ops engineering cycles, but may contribute across projects as needed](https://fathom.video/share/S8zKX5FzHtXziLEekZ6ziqx-iaF-S3N_?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
  - [Team is considering removing Sorbet (Ruby typing) from Atlas codebase due to tooling immaturity](https://fathom.video/share/S8zKX5FzHtXziLEekZ6ziqx-iaF-S3N_?tab=summary&timestamp=2598.0)

## Topics

### Company Structure and Strategy

  - [GrowthX started as a growth agency, now expanding into AI tooling and infrastructure](https://fathom.video/share/S8zKX5FzHtXziLEekZ6ziqx-iaF-S3N_?tab=summary&timestamp=31.0)
  - [Three key areas:](https://fathom.video/share/S8zKX5FzHtXziLEekZ6ziqx-iaF-S3N_?tab=summary&timestamp=31.0)
    1.  Agency services (content creation, marketing)
    2.  Atlas - project management tool for agency work
    3.  AI infrastructure (Flow, Studio) - for workflow creation and management
  - [Goal: Validate hypothesis that AI tooling can make previously unscalable service businesses (e.g. design/SEO agencies) scalable](https://fathom.video/share/S8zKX5FzHtXziLEekZ6ziqx-iaF-S3N_?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [Opportunity to leverage "frontier data" from agency work to improve AI capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/S8zKX5FzHtXziLEekZ6ziqx-iaF-S3N_?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)

### Current Challenges and Focus

  - [Migrating from AirOps to Atlas for improved workflow management](https://fathom.video/share/S8zKX5FzHtXziLEekZ6ziqx-iaF-S3N_?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)
  - [Stabilizing client ops engineering processes](https://fathom.video/share/S8zKX5FzHtXziLEekZ6ziqx-iaF-S3N_?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
  - [Improving ability to create custom workflows for complex client needs](https://fathom.video/share/S8zKX5FzHtXziLEekZ6ziqx-iaF-S3N_?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [Balancing "cookie-cutter" editorial work with custom, high-value projects](https://fathom.video/share/S8zKX5FzHtXziLEekZ6ziqx-iaF-S3N_?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Scaling ability to onboard new clients and customize workflows efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/S8zKX5FzHtXziLEekZ6ziqx-iaF-S3N_?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)

### Team Structure and Workflows

  - [Client Ops Engineering team sits at intersection of multiple areas (tooling, workflows, client needs)](https://fathom.video/share/S8zKX5FzHtXziLEekZ6ziqx-iaF-S3N_?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [Moving to 2-week cycles for prioritizing and executing client ops work](https://fathom.video/share/S8zKX5FzHtXziLEekZ6ziqx-iaF-S3N_?tab=summary&timestamp=1635.0)
  - [Using Linear for project/task management across teams](https://fathom.video/share/S8zKX5FzHtXziLEekZ6ziqx-iaF-S3N_?tab=summary&timestamp=1635.0)
  - [Exploring ways to allow non-technical team members (e.g. Jason, Marcel) to create/modify workflows](https://fathom.video/share/S8zKX5FzHtXziLEekZ6ziqx-iaF-S3N_?tab=summary&timestamp=1136.0)

### Technology Stack and Tools

  - [Three main GitHub repos: Atlas (Rails), Flow (core AI/automation), Studio (UI for Flow)](https://fathom.video/share/S8zKX5FzHtXziLEekZ6ziqx-iaF-S3N_?tab=summary&timestamp=1927.0)
  - [Using Temporo for certain functionality](https://fathom.video/share/S8zKX5FzHtXziLEekZ6ziqx-iaF-S3N_?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)
  - [Considering chat interface in Studio for workflow creation](https://fathom.video/share/S8zKX5FzHtXziLEekZ6ziqx-iaF-S3N_?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)
  - [Currently using Sorbet for Ruby typing in Atlas, but reconsidering due to tooling challenges](https://fathom.video/share/S8zKX5FzHtXziLEekZ6ziqx-iaF-S3N_?tab=summary&timestamp=2598.0)

### Onboarding Plan for Pedro

  - [First week: Focus on understanding context, codebase, and team dynamics](https://fathom.video/share/S8zKX5FzHtXziLEekZ6ziqx-iaF-S3N_?tab=summary&timestamp=1715.0)
  - [Schedule intro meetings with key team members (Andy, Jason, Kirk, Marcus, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/S8zKX5FzHtXziLEekZ6ziqx-iaF-S3N_?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Review Linear board, particularly the "AirOps Migration" project](https://fathom.video/share/S8zKX5FzHtXziLEekZ6ziqx-iaF-S3N_?tab=summary&timestamp=1597.0)
  - [Next week: Begin hands-on coding work](https://fathom.video/share/S8zKX5FzHtXziLEekZ6ziqx-iaF-S3N_?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)
  - [Following Tuesday: Participate in first Client Ops End Cycle planning](https://fathom.video/share/S8zKX5FzHtXziLEekZ6ziqx-iaF-S3N_?tab=summary&timestamp=1671.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Pedro to complete setup of local development environment](https://fathom.video/share/S8zKX5FzHtXziLEekZ6ziqx-iaF-S3N_?tab=summary&timestamp=1597.0)
  - [Schedule remaining intro meetings (Andy, Jason)](https://fathom.video/share/S8zKX5FzHtXziLEekZ6ziqx-iaF-S3N_?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Review Linear board and AirOps Migration project tasks](https://fathom.video/share/S8zKX5FzHtXziLEekZ6ziqx-iaF-S3N_?tab=summary&timestamp=1597.0)
  - [Daniel to start weekly 1:1 meetings with Pedro once current coding sprint ends](https://fathom.video/share/S8zKX5FzHtXziLEekZ6ziqx-iaF-S3N_?tab=summary&timestamp=2625.0)
  - [Team to discuss potential removal of Sorbet from Atlas codebase](https://fathom.video/share/S8zKX5FzHtXziLEekZ6ziqx-iaF-S3N_?tab=summary&timestamp=2607.0)
